# Jonathan Lloyd -- Human Datastream

> Personal portfolio of Jonathan Lloyd, an engineering director and backend engineer, built as a living data dashboard. Real biometrics and constant updates of his whole body (health, activity, hydration, location) and mind (coding, reading, learning). Jack into his human datastream as the world becomes more AI-centric.

## About

Jonathan Lloyd is an engineering director and backend engineer based in San Francisco with 24+ years of professional experience. His portfolio site is a sci-fi "Human Datastream" dashboard -- a single-page application that visualizes real-time personal data across two domains: Body and Mind.

- Site: https://jonathanlloyd.me
- GitHub: https://github.com/j0nathan-ll0yd
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lifegames/

## Live LLM-optimized content

Auto-composed by the backend whenever source data changes. These files are always fresher than this static discovery index. Body metrics use 7-day aggregates only; GitHub, books, reading, and theatre use full granularity.

- [llms-small.txt (~5 KB)](https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/llms-small.txt) -- Current-state snapshot: profile, body aggregates, last 7 days of coding and reading activity, current book
- [llms-full.txt (~20 KB)](https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/llms-full.txt) -- Complete data dump: all domains as structured markdown with tables and source citations
- [index.md](https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/index.md) -- Markdown alias of llms-full.txt for agents expecting .md extensions

## Canonical JSON

The backend composes the markdown variants from these live JSON sources. LLMs that prefer raw machine-readable data can fetch them directly:

- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/health.json -- biometrics (heart rate, HRV, activity, workouts)
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/sleep.json -- sleep phases and efficiency
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/focus.json -- focus / Do Not Disturb state
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/github-events.json -- dev activity, languages, contributions, recent commits
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/github-starred-repos.json -- starred repositories
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/books.json -- bookshelf with status, ratings, progress
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/articles.json -- article feed items
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/theatre-reviews.json -- theatre reviews
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/workouts.json -- workout sessions and summaries
- https://d1pfm520aduift.cloudfront.net/location.json -- location aggregates and place summaries

All endpoints are served with `Cache-Control: public, s-maxage=300` (5-minute edge TTL).

## Technology

- **Framework**: Astro 5.x (static site generation, 0 KB JS by default)
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions, fronted by Cloudflare CDN
- **Live data**: CloudFront-backed JSON API polled at runtime by the dashboard; same JSON composed into LLM-friendly markdown by the backend
- **Design**: Glass-morphism, dark theme, fluid `clamp()` responsive tokens, CSS container queries

## Documentation

- [Wiki: LLM Content Spec](https://github.com/j0nathan-ll0yd/j0nathan-ll0yd.github.io/wiki/LLM-Content-Spec) -- Format, URLs, freshness, Level 2 health constraint
- [Wiki: Architecture](https://github.com/j0nathan-ll0yd/j0nathan-ll0yd.github.io/wiki/Astro-Implementation) -- Components, data flow, build system
- [Wiki: Brand Guide](https://github.com/j0nathan-ll0yd/j0nathan-ll0yd.github.io/wiki/Brand-Guide) -- Colors, typography, glass-morphism

## Expertise

Backend Engineering, Software Engineering, Engineering Leadership, Cloud Infrastructure, Data Visualization, Serverless Architecture, TypeScript, Go, AWS
